Jack Dorsey laying off thousands due to AI; says 'he didn’t want backs against wall'
description: Fintech giant Block's CEO Jack Dorsey revealed AI drove a massive 40% workforce reduction, impacting over 4,000 employees. Experiments with advanced AI models convinced leadership that fewer staff could maintain operations and growth. Dorsey emphasized acting with integrity and generosity, aiming for excellence by embracing AI proactively, not reactively.

title: Aryna Sabalenka’s fiancé Georgios Frangulis hits back at critics over match presence
description: Georgios Frangulis responded strongly to critics questioning his presence at Aryna Sabalenka’s matches. In a podcast video, he explained how he balances work and support for his fiancé. Sabalenka also shared how the relationship has shaped her mindset. Meanwhile, she continues a strong tennis season despite a recent injury forcing her to miss the Stuttgart Open.

title: Josh Allen, Hailee Steinfeld step out glowing after welcoming their first child
description: NFL star Josh Allen and actress Hailee Steinfeld welcomed their baby daughter, sharing the joyous news on Thursday. Just a day later, the new parents made a dazzling appearance at Josh's best friend Sam Darnold's wedding. The couple, radiating happiness, celebrated with fellow NFL players, even sharing baby photos, proving they can balance new parenthood with social commitments.
